chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 122 – Arrival of Abu Ja’far Muhammad Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup> (9<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (108/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (108/ 6)
text: قُبِضَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَ هُوَ ابْنُ خَمْسٍ وَ عِشْرِينَ سَنَةً وَ ثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ وَ اثْنَيْ عَشَرَ يَوْماً تُوُفِّيَ يَوْمَ الثَّلَاثَاءِ لِسِتٍّ خَلَوْنَ مِنْ ذِي الْحِجَّةِ سَنَةَ عِشْرِينَ وَ مِائَتَيْنِ عَاشَ بَعْدَ أَبِيهِ تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ سَنَةً إِلَّا خَمْساً وَ عِشْرِينَ يَوْماً .

en.hubeali: Sa’d Bin Abdullah and Al Himeyri, altogether from Ibrahim Bin Mahziyar, from his brother Ali, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Sinan who said,

‘Muhammad Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> (9<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) passed away and he<sup>asws</sup> was twenty-five years and three months and twelve days old. He<sup>asws</sup> passed away on the day of Tuesday on the sixth of Zil Hijjad, in the year two hundred and twenty. He<sup>asws</sup> lived after his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> for nineteen years less twenty-five days’.
en.sarwar: 11. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali-Hajjal and ‘Amr ibn ‘Uthman from a man of the people of al-Madina from Ali-Mutrifiy who has said the following. “Abu al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) passed away and owed my four thousand dirhams. I said to myself, “My money is lost.” Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) sent me a message to come to him the next day and bring with me a balance and weighing stones.” I went to see hiom and he said, “Abu al-Hassan has passed away. Did he owe you four thousand Dirhams?” I said, “Yes, he did.” He then lifted up his prayer rug on which was sitting and there were Dinars and he give them to me.”
